```{=html}
<link href="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/bootstrap@5.3.0/dist/css/bootstrap.min.css" rel="stylesheet"/>
<script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/svguitar@2.4.1/dist/svguitar.umd.min.js"></script>
<style>
/* guitar2.css */
#fretboard-root {
  /* …other vars… */
  --accent-pink:      #e88697;
  --accent-turquoise: #00b4ce;
}
/* Reset margins and set a light background */
#fretboard-root {
  margin: 0;
  padding: 0;
  background-color: #f8f9fa;
  font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", Roboto, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif;
}

/* Wrapper around the diagram */
#diagram-wrapper {
  position: relative;
  background-color: #ffffff;
  border: 1px solid #dee2e6;
  border-radius: .375rem;
  overflow: hidden;
}

/* Container for the SVG chord – ensure it fills the wrapper */
#chord-container {
  position: relative;
  width: 100%;
  height: auto;
}

/* Transparent overlay to capture clicks */
.click-overlay {
  position: absolute;
  top: 0;
  left: 0;
  width: 100%;
  height: 100%;
  cursor: pointer;
  background: transparent;
  z-index: 10;
}

/* Inline Dot customization panel */
#dot-menu {
  display: none;
  margin-bottom: 1rem;
  border: 1px solid #dee2e6;
  border-radius: .375rem;
  background-color: #ffffff;
}

#dot-menu .card-header {
  background-color: #f1f3f5;
  border-bottom: 1px solid #dee2e6;
}

#dot-menu .btn-close {
  border: none;
  background: transparent;
  font-size: 1.25rem;
}

/* Inputs inside the menu get full width */
#dot-menu .form-control,
#dot-menu .form-control-color {
  width: 100%;
}

/* Fix for color pickers */
.form-control-color {
  padding: .375rem .75rem;
}

/* Ensure SVG scales responsively */
#chord-container svg {
  width: 100%;
  height: auto;
  display: block;
}

/* Button spacing */
.btn {
  min-width: 120px;
}

/* Small adjustment for form labels */
.form-label {
  font-weight: 500;
}

/* — RESPONSIVE WRAPPER RULES — */

/* Base: fluid width, with JS‐controlled max-width, centered */
.svg-wrapper {
  width: 100%;
  margin: 0 auto;

  /* allow horizontal scroll if contents overflow */
  overflow-x: auto;
  -webkit-overflow-scrolling: touch;
  overflow-y: hidden;
}

/* Ensure the inner SVG always fills its parent */
.svg-wrapper svg {
  width: 100% !important;
  height: auto !important;
  display: block;
}

/* On very small viewports, remove any side cap entirely */
@media (max-width: 576px) {
  .svg-wrapper {
    padding: 0 0.5rem;
  }
}

/* Slider label styling */
#config-max-width {
  margin-top: 0.25rem;
}
#max-width-value {
  font-weight: bold;
}
@media (max-width: 576px) {
  /* hide the slider input */
  #config-max-width {
    display: none !important;
  }
  /* hide the "600px" live‐value span */
  #max-width-value {
    display: none !important;
  }
  /* hide the label that shows “Diagram Max Width:” */
  label[for="config-max-width"] {
    display: none !important;
  }
}
.btn-secondary {
  background-color: var(--accent-pink) !important;
  border-color:     var(--accent-pink) !important;
  color:            #fff;
}
.btn-secondary:hover {
  background-color: #d37686;  /* a slightly darker hover */
}

.btn-success {
  background-color: var(--accent-turquoise) !important;
  border-color:     var(--accent-turquoise) !important;
  color:            #fff;
}
.btn-success:hover {
  background-color: #00a4bc;  /* a slightly darker hover */
}

.btn-outline-primary {
  color:           var(--accent-turquoise);
  border-color:    var(--accent-turquoise);
}
.btn-outline-primary:hover {
  background-color: var(--accent-turquoise);
  color:            #fff;
}
.accordion .accordion-item::before {
  background: var(--accent-pink);
}
.accordion-button:not(.collapsed) {
  background-color: var(--accent-turquoise);
  color:            #fff;
}
/* allow the open/muted buttons to wrap on small screens */
@media (max-width: 576px) {
  #nut-controls-container {
    flex-wrap: wrap !important;
    justify-content: center;
    gap: 0.75rem; /* same as on desktop */
  }
}
@font-face {
  font-family: "MW Neutra Demi";
  src: url("/brand/fonts/NeutraText-Demi.otf") format("opentype");
  font-weight: 600;
  font-style: normal;
  font-display: swap;
}

@font-face {
  font-family: "MW Neutra Bold Alt";
  src: url("/brand/fonts/NeutraText-BoldAlt.otf") format("opentype");
  font-weight: 700;
  font-style: normal;
  font-display: swap;
}

#fretboard-root {
  --mw-mint: #7ac4b4;
  --mw-teal: #00acc3;
  --mw-deep-teal: #0d6f7f;
  --mw-pink: #f4bbca;
  --mw-rose: #d989a4;
  --mw-ink: #163933;
  --mw-paper: #f7fffd;
  --mw-border: #abd9d0;
  --mw-body-font: "MW Neutra Demi", "Avenir Next", "Segoe UI", sans-serif;
  --mw-display-font: "MW Neutra Bold Alt", "Avenir Next", sans-serif;
}

body.mw-legacy-page {
  margin: 0;
  color: var(--mw-ink);
  background-image:
    linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(248, 255, 252, 0.88), rgba(248, 255, 252, 0.93)),
    url("/brand/backgrounds/MW_paleturquoise_bg.png");
  background-repeat: no-repeat, repeat;
  background-size: cover, 620px auto;
  font-family: var(--mw-body-font);
}

body.mw-legacy-page h1,
body.mw-legacy-page h2,
body.mw-legacy-page h3,
body.mw-legacy-page h4,
body.mw-legacy-page h5,
body.mw-legacy-page .panel-title {
  font-family: var(--mw-display-font);
  color: var(--mw-ink);
  letter-spacing: 0.01em;
}

body.mw-legacy-page .container {
  width: min(1120px, 92vw);
}

.mw-legacy-nav {
  --bs-navbar-padding-y: 0;
  --bs-navbar-padding-x: 0;
  position: sticky;
  top: 0;
  z-index: 1040;
  margin-bottom: 1.5rem !important;
  backdrop-filter: blur(8px);
  background-image:
    linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.96), rgba(244, 253, 250, 0.94)),
    url("/brand/patterns/SquarePattern_White.svg");
  background-repeat: no-repeat, repeat;
  background-size: cover, 200px auto;
  border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(171, 217, 208, 0.86);
  box-shadow: 0 8px 20px rgba(22, 57, 51, 0.08);
}

.mw-legacy-nav .container-fluid {
  width: min(1120px, 92vw);
  margin: 0 auto;
  min-height: 74px;
  padding: 0;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: space-between;
  gap: 14px;
}

.mw-legacy-nav .navbar-brand {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  padding: 0;
  margin-right: auto;
}

.mw-legacy-nav .navbar-brand img {
  width: min(300px, 40vw);
  height: auto;
  display: block;
}

.mw-legacy-nav ul {
  padding-left: 0 !important;
  margin-bottom: 0 !important;
}

.mw-legacy-nav li {
  list-style: none !important;
  margin: 0 !important;
  padding: 0 !important;
}

.mw-legacy-nav a {
  text-decoration: none !important;
}

.mw-legacy-nav [role="button"] {
  margin: 0 !important;
}

.mw-legacy-nav .navbar-nav {
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: flex-end;
  gap: 7px;
  margin-left: auto;
}

.mw-legacy-nav .nav-link,
.mw-legacy-nav .dropdown-item {
  font-family: var(--mw-display-font);
  letter-spacing: 0.02em;
  font-size: 0.84rem;
  line-height: 1.1;
}

.mw-legacy-nav .nav-link {
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  padding: 8px 10px;
  border-radius: 999px;
  border: 1px solid transparent;
  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.58);
  color: var(--mw-ink);
  transition: background-color 0.2s ease, border-color 0.2s ease, color 0.2s ease;
}

.mw-legacy-nav .navbar-collapse {
  flex-grow: 0;
  justify-content: flex-end;
}

.mw-legacy-nav .dropdown-toggle::after {
  content: "▾";
  border: 0;
  margin-left: 6px;
  font-size: 0.62rem;
  line-height: 1;
  vertical-align: middle;
}

.mw-legacy-nav .nav-link:hover,
.mw-legacy-nav .nav-link:focus,
.mw-legacy-nav .nav-link.show,
.mw-legacy-nav .dropdown-toggle.show {
  background: #ffffff;
  border-color: #c6e9e1;
  color: var(--mw-deep-teal);
  box-shadow: none !important;
  outline: 0;
}

.mw-legacy-nav .dropdown-menu {
  right: 0;
  left: auto;
  min-width: 220px !important;
  display: none !important;
  gap: 6px !important;
  margin-top: 8px !important;
  padding: 8px !important;
  border-radius: 12px !important;
  border: 1px solid rgba(171, 217, 208, 0.9) !important;
  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.98) !important;
  box-shadow: 0 14px 24px rgba(22, 57, 51, 0.12) !important;
}

.mw-legacy-nav .dropdown-menu.show {
  display: grid !important;
}

.mw-legacy-nav .dropdown-item {
  display: block !important;
  width: 100% !important;
  min-height: 0 !important;
  margin: 0 !important;
  padding: 8px 10px !important;
  border-radius: 9px;
  border: 1px solid transparent;
  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.7);
  color: var(--mw-ink);
  line-height: 1.1 !important;
  white-space: nowrap;
  transition: background-color 0.2s ease, border-color 0.2s ease, color 0.2s ease;
}

.mw-legacy-nav .dropdown-item:hover,
.mw-legacy-nav .dropdown-item:focus {
  background: #ffffff;
  border-color: #c6e9e1;
  color: var(--mw-deep-teal);
}

.mw-legacy-nav .navbar-toggler {
  border-radius: 12px;
  border: 1px solid rgba(171, 217, 208, 0.9);
  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.84);
}

body.mw-legacy-page main.container,
body.mw-legacy-page .container.py-4,
body.mw-legacy-page main.container-fluid {
  padding-bottom: 3rem;
}

body.mw-legacy-page article,
body.mw-legacy-page .card,
body.mw-legacy-page .accordion-item,
body.mw-legacy-page .composer,
body.mw-legacy-page .toolsbar {
  border-radius: 16px;
  border: 1px solid rgba(171, 217, 208, 0.9);
  background: linear-gradient(180deg, #ffffff, #f9fffd);
  box-shadow: 0 10px 18px rgba(24, 54, 49, 0.08);
}

body.mw-legacy-page .card,
body.mw-legacy-page .accordion-item {
  overflow: hidden;
}

body.mw-legacy-page .card-header,
body.mw-legacy-page .accordion-button,
body.mw-legacy-page .composer,
body.mw-legacy-page .toolsbar {
  background: linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.96), rgba(244, 253, 250, 0.96));
  color: var(--mw-deep-teal);
}

body.mw-legacy-page .accordion-button:not(.collapsed) {
  box-shadow: none;
}

body.mw-legacy-page .card-header strong,
body.mw-legacy-page .accordion-button,
body.mw-legacy-page summary[role="button"] {
  font-family: var(--mw-display-font);
  letter-spacing: 0.01em;
}

body.mw-legacy-page button:not(.navbar-toggler):not(.btn-close):not(.accordion-button),
body.mw-legacy-page .btn,
body.mw-legacy-page summary[role="button"],
body.mw-legacy-page details summary {
  border-radius: 10px;
  font-family: var(--mw-display-font);
  letter-spacing: 0.015em;
  transition: background-color 0.2s ease, border-color 0.2s ease, color 0.2s ease;
}

body.mw-legacy-page button:not(.navbar-toggler):not(.btn-close):not(.btn):not(.accordion-button):not(.nav-link):not(.dropdown-item) {
  border: 1px solid rgba(217, 137, 164, 0.88);
  background: #f4bbca;
  color: #4f2030;
  box-shadow: none;
}

body.mw-legacy-page button.outline,
body.mw-legacy-page .btn-outline-primary,
body.mw-legacy-page .btn-outline-secondary,
body.mw-legacy-page .btn-outline-success,
body.mw-legacy-page summary[role="button"],
body.mw-legacy-page .accordion-button,
body.mw-legacy-page .dropdown-toggle.btn-outline-secondary,
body.mw-legacy-page .dropdown-toggle.btn-outline-success {
  border-color: rgba(134, 201, 190, 0.9);
  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.96);
  color: var(--mw-deep-teal);
  box-shadow: none;
}

body.mw-legacy-page .btn-primary,
body.mw-legacy-page .btn-success {
  border-color: rgba(217, 137, 164, 0.88);
  background: #f4bbca;
  color: #4f2030;
  box-shadow: none;
}

body.mw-legacy-page .btn-secondary {
  border-color: rgba(13, 111, 127, 0.88);
  background: #0f7d8e;
  color: #effffd;
  box-shadow: none;
}

body.mw-legacy-page button:not(.navbar-toggler):not(.btn-close):not(.btn):not(.accordion-button):not(.nav-link):not(.dropdown-item):hover,
body.mw-legacy-page .btn-primary:hover,
body.mw-legacy-page .btn-success:hover {
  background: #efafc0;
  border-color: rgba(196, 112, 143, 0.9);
  color: #4f2030;
}

body.mw-legacy-page .btn-secondary:hover {
  background: #0d6f7f;
  border-color: rgba(10, 89, 100, 0.9);
  color: #effffd;
}

body.mw-legacy-page .btn-link {
  color: var(--mw-deep-teal);
  font-family: var(--mw-display-font);
}

body.mw-legacy-page .form-control:focus,
body.mw-legacy-page .form-select:focus,
body.mw-legacy-page input:focus,
body.mw-legacy-page select:focus,
body.mw-legacy-page textarea:focus {
  border-color: rgba(0, 172, 195, 0.45);
  box-shadow: 0 0 0 0.2rem rgba(0, 172, 195, 0.14);
}

body.mw-legacy-page .keyboard-outer-container,
body.mw-legacy-page #diagram-wrapper,
body.mw-legacy-page #exportArea,
body.mw-legacy-page .notation-container,
body.mw-legacy-page .card-body,
body.mw-legacy-page .svg-wrapper,
body.mw-legacy-page .panel-col .card-body {
  background: #ffffff;
}

@media (max-width: 991.98px) {
  .mw-legacy-nav .container-fluid {
    width: min(1120px, 94vw);
    padding: 8px 0;
    flex-wrap: wrap;
  }

  .mw-legacy-nav .navbar-collapse {
    width: 100%;
    padding-top: 10px;
  }

  .mw-legacy-nav .navbar-nav {
    align-items: stretch;
    gap: 8px;
    margin-left: 0;
  }

  .mw-legacy-nav .nav-link {
    display: block;
    width: 100%;
    text-align: left;
  }

  .mw-legacy-nav .navbar-collapse {
    justify-content: flex-start;
  }

  .mw-legacy-nav .dropdown-menu {
    margin-top: 6px;
  }
}

@media (max-width: 680px) {
  .mw-legacy-nav .navbar-brand img {
    width: min(240px, 78vw);
  }
}

</style>

<div id="fretboard-root">
  <div class="container py-4">
    <h1 class="mb-4">Fretboard Diagram Generator</h1>
    <div class="accordion mb-3" id="mainAccordion">
      <div class="accordion-item">
        <h2 class="accordion-header" id="headingLayout">
          <button class="accordion-button collapsed" type="button" data-bs-toggle="collapse" data-bs-target="#collapseLayout">Layout</button>
        </h2>
        <div id="collapseLayout" class="accordion-collapse collapse" data-bs-parent="#mainAccordion">
          <div class="accordion-body">
            <div class="row g-3 mb-3">
              <div class="col-md-2"><label class="form-label">Preset Tuning</label><select id="preset-tuning" class="form-select"><option value="">Custom</option><option value="gtr-std">Guitar Standard</option><option value="gtr-dropd">Guitar Drop D</option><option value="gtr-openg">Guitar Open G</option><option value="uke-soprano">Ukulele Soprano</option><option value="uke-baritone">Ukulele Baritone</option><option value="uke-bass">Ukulele Bass</option><option value="banjo">Banjo</option><option value="bass-4">Bass (4-string)</option></select></div>
              <div class="col-md-2"><label class="form-label">Strings</label><input id="config-strings" type="number" class="form-control" value="6" min="1"/></div>
              <div class="col-md-2"><label class="form-label">Frets</label><input id="config-frets" type="number" class="form-control" value="4" min="1"/></div>
              <div class="col-md-2"><label class="form-label">Orientation</label><select id="config-orientation" class="form-select"><option value="vertical">Vertical</option><option value="horizontal">Horizontal</option></select></div>
              <div class="col-md-4"><label class="form-label">String Labels (comma-separated)</label><input id="config-string-labels" type="text" class="form-control" placeholder="E, A, D, G, B, E"/><div class="form-check form-switch mt-2"><input class="form-check-input" type="checkbox" id="config-show-string-labels" checked/><label class="form-check-label" for="config-show-string-labels">Show String Labels</label></div></div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="accordion-item">
        <h2 class="accordion-header" id="headingText">
          <button class="accordion-button collapsed" type="button" data-bs-toggle="collapse" data-bs-target="#collapseText">Text</button>
        </h2>
        <div id="collapseText" class="accordion-collapse collapse" data-bs-parent="#mainAccordion">
          <div class="accordion-body row g-3">
            <div class="col-md-4"><label class="form-label">Title</label><input id="config-title" type="text" class="form-control" placeholder="Chord Name"/></div>
            <div class="col-md-2"><label class="form-label">Title Size</label><input id="config-title-size" type="number" class="form-control" value="48" min="8"/></div>
            <div class="col-md-2"><label class="form-label">Start Fret</label><input id="config-position" type="number" class="form-control" value="1" min="1"/></div>
            <div class="col-md-2 d-flex align-items-end"><div class="form-check form-switch w-100"><input class="form-check-input" type="checkbox" id="config-hide-position-label"/><label class="form-check-label" for="config-hide-position-label">Hide Start Fret Label</label></div></div>
            <div class="col-md-2"><label class="form-label">Fret Label Size</label><input id="config-fret-label-size" type="number" class="form-control" value="38" min="1"/></div>
            <div class="col-md-4"><label class="form-label">Watermark Text</label><input id="config-watermark-text" type="text" class="form-control" value="MusicalWonders.org" placeholder="Enter watermark or leave blank"/></div>
            <div class="col-md-2"><label class="form-label">Watermark Size</label><input id="config-watermark-size" type="number" class="form-control" value="12" min="6"/></div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="accordion-item">
        <h2 class="accordion-header" id="headingMute">
          <button class="accordion-button collapsed" type="button" data-bs-toggle="collapse" data-bs-target="#collapseMute">Open / Muted Strings</button>
        </h2>
        <div id="collapseMute" class="accordion-collapse collapse" data-bs-parent="#mainAccordion">
          <div class="accordion-body"><div id="nut-controls-container" class="d-flex flex-wrap justify-content-center gap-3"></div></div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div id="dot-menu" class="card mb-3" style="display:none;">
      <div class="card-header d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center"><span>Customize Dot</span><button id="dot-menu-close" type="button" class="btn-close"></button></div>
      <div class="card-body row g-3">
        <div class="col-6"><label for="config-dot-fill-color" class="form-label">Fill Color</label><input type="color" id="config-dot-fill-color" class="form-control form-control-color" value="#000000"/></div>
        <div class="col-6"><label for="config-dot-stroke-color" class="form-label">Stroke Color</label><input type="color" id="config-dot-stroke-color" class="form-control form-control-color" value="#000000"/></div>
        <div class="col-4"><label for="config-dot-stroke-width" class="form-label">Stroke Width</label><input type="number" id="config-dot-stroke-width" class="form-control" value="1" min="0" step="0.1"/></div>
        <div class="col-8"><label for="config-dot-label-text" class="form-label">Label Text</label><input type="text" id="config-dot-label-text" class="form-control" placeholder="e.g. 1"/></div>
        <div class="col-6"><label for="config-dot-label-color" class="form-label">Label Color</label><input type="color" id="config-dot-label-color" class="form-control form-control-color" value="#ffffff"/></div>
        <div class="col-6"><label for="config-dot-label-size" class="form-label">Label Size</label><input type="number" id="config-dot-label-size" class="form-control" value="12" min="6"/></div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="d-flex flex-wrap mb-3 align-items-center justify-content-center">
      <button id="btn-customize" class="btn btn-outline-primary me-2 mb-2">Customize Dots</button>
      <button id="btn-clear" class="btn btn-secondary me-2 mb-2">Clear Dots</button>
      <button id="download-svg" class="btn btn-success me-2 mb-2">Download SVG</button>
      <button id="download-png" class="btn btn-success me-2 mb-2">Download PNG</button>
      <div class="form-check form-switch ms-3 mb-2"><input class="form-check-input" type="checkbox" id="config-style"/><label class="form-check-label" for="config-style">Hand-drawn Style</label></div>
    </div>

    <div class="svg-wrapper mx-auto mb-3">
      <div id="diagram-wrapper" class="border p-3 position-relative">
        <div id="chord-container" class="position-relative">
          <div id="click-overlay" class="click-overlay"></div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="row gx-2 align-items-center">
      <div class="col-auto"><label for="config-max-width" class="form-label mb-0">Diagram Max Width: <span id="max-width-value">600px</span></label></div>
      <div class="col"><input id="config-max-width" type="range" class="form-range" min="200" max="1200" step="10" value="600"/></div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/bootstrap@5.3.0/dist/js/bootstrap.bundle.min.js"></script>
  <script>
// guitar2.js

// 1) Preset tunings
const PRESETS = {
  'gtr-std':     { strings: 6, tuning: 'E,A,D,G,B,E' },
  'gtr-dropd':   { strings: 6, tuning: 'D,A,D,G,B,E' },
  'gtr-openg':   { strings: 6, tuning: 'D,G,D,G,B,D' },
  'uke-soprano': { strings: 4, tuning: 'G,C,E,A' },
  'uke-baritone':{ strings: 4, tuning: 'D,G,B,E' },
  'uke-bass':    { strings: 4, tuning: 'E,A,D,G' },
  'banjo':       { strings: 5, tuning: 'G,D,G,B,D' },
  'bass-4':      { strings: 4, tuning: 'E,A,D,G' }
};

// 2) Application state
let chordData  = { fingers: [], barres: [] };
let configData = {
  strings:            6,
  frets:              4,
  tuning:            ['E','A','D','G','B','E'],
  orientation:       'vertical',
  title:              '',
  titleFontSize:      48,
  position:           1,
  hidePositionLabel: false,
  fretLabelFontSize:  38,
  fretLabelColor:    '#000000',
  style:             'normal',
  strokeWidth:        2,
  backgroundColor:  '#ffffff',
  fingerTextSize:     20,
  // watermark defaults
  watermarkText:      'MusicalWonders.org',
  watermarkFontSize:  12,
  // new: user override for wrapper max-width (px)
  maxWidth:          600
};

// 3) Dot customization options
let dotOptions = {
  fillColor:     '#000000',
  strokeColor:   '#000000',
  strokeWidth:    1,
  labelText:     '',
  labelColor:    '#ffffff',
  labelFontSize: 12
};

// 4) Drag state for barre creation
let dragStart = null;

// 4b) Ghost preview state
let preview = { finger: null, barre: null };

// 5) Initialize SVGuitar
const chordChart = new svguitar.SVGuitarChord('#chord-container');

document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => {
  const $ = id => document.getElementById(id);

  // Dot customization panel toggle
  $('btn-customize').addEventListener('click', () => {
    const menu = $('dot-menu');
    menu.style.display = (menu.style.display === 'none') ? 'block' : 'none';
  });
  $('dot-menu-close').addEventListener('click', () => {
    $('dot-menu').style.display = 'none';
  });

  // Dot option inputs
  [
    'config-dot-fill-color',
    'config-dot-stroke-color',
    'config-dot-stroke-width',
    'config-dot-label-text',
    'config-dot-label-color',
    'config-dot-label-size'
  ].forEach(id => {
    const el = $(id);
    if (!el) return;
    el.addEventListener('input', () => {
      switch(id) {
        case 'config-dot-fill-color':    dotOptions.fillColor    = el.value; break;
        case 'config-dot-stroke-color':  dotOptions.strokeColor  = el.value; break;
        case 'config-dot-stroke-width':  dotOptions.strokeWidth  = parseFloat(el.value) || dotOptions.strokeWidth; break;
        case 'config-dot-label-text':    dotOptions.labelText    = el.value; break;
        case 'config-dot-label-color':   dotOptions.labelColor   = el.value; break;
        case 'config-dot-label-size':
          dotOptions.labelFontSize = parseInt(el.value,10) || dotOptions.labelFontSize;
          configData.fingerTextSize = dotOptions.labelFontSize;
          chordData.fingers.forEach(f => f[2] && (f[2].textSize = dotOptions.labelFontSize));
          chordData.barres.forEach(b => b.textSize != null && (b.textSize = dotOptions.labelFontSize));
          renderChord();
          break;
      }
    });
  });

  // Core config controls (auto-redraw), now including max-width
  [
    'preset-tuning','config-strings','config-frets','config-orientation',
    'config-title','config-title-size','config-position','config-hide-position-label',
    'config-fret-label-size','config-style',
    'config-string-labels','config-show-string-labels',
    'config-watermark-text','config-watermark-size'
  ].forEach(id => {
    const el = $(id);
    if (el) el.addEventListener('input', onConfigChange);
  });
  // —— NEW SLIDER HANDLING ——
  const maxWidthSlider = $('config-max-width');
  const maxWidthLabel  = $('max-width-value');
  maxWidthSlider.addEventListener('input', () => {
    maxWidthLabel.textContent = maxWidthSlider.value + 'px';
    onConfigChange();
  });
  // Overlay events: mousedown for barre start, mouseup for barre/dot end
  const overlay = $('click-overlay');
  overlay.addEventListener('mousedown', onOverlayDown);
  overlay.addEventListener('mouseup',   onOverlayUp);
  overlay.addEventListener('mousemove', onOverlayMove);
  overlay.addEventListener('mouseleave', () => {
    preview = { finger: null, barre: null };
    renderChord();
  });
	
overlay.addEventListener('touchstart', e => {
  e.preventDefault();
  const touch = e.touches[0];

  // seed dragStart with a “mouse‐like” event
  onOverlayDown({ clientX: touch.clientX, clientY: touch.clientY });
  // show the ghost preview immediately
  onOverlayMove({ clientX: touch.clientX, clientY: touch.clientY });
});

overlay.addEventListener('touchmove', e => {
  e.preventDefault();
  const touch = e.touches[0];
  onOverlayMove({ clientX: touch.clientX, clientY: touch.clientY });
});

overlay.addEventListener('touchend', e => {
  e.preventDefault();
  const touch = e.changedTouches[0];
  onOverlayUp({ clientX: touch.clientX, clientY: touch.clientY });
});

  // Clear & download
  $('btn-clear').addEventListener('click', clearAll);
  $('download-svg').addEventListener('click', downloadSVG);
  $('download-png').addEventListener('click', downloadPNG);

  // Initial render
  onConfigChange();
});

// 6) Read config & redraw
function onConfigChange() {
  readConfig();
  buildNutControls();
  renderChord();

  // enforce the user's chosen max-width
  document.querySelector('.svg-wrapper')
          .style.maxWidth = configData.maxWidth + 'px';
}

function readConfig() {
  const $ = id => document.getElementById(id);
  const preset = $('preset-tuning').value;
  if (preset && PRESETS[preset]) {
    configData.strings = PRESETS[preset].strings;
    configData.tuning  = PRESETS[preset].tuning.split(',');
    $('config-strings').value = configData.strings;
  }

  configData.strings           = parseInt($('config-strings').value,10)   || configData.strings;
  configData.frets             = parseInt($('config-frets').value,10)     || configData.frets;
  configData.orientation       = $('config-orientation').value;
  configData.title             = $('config-title').value;
  configData.titleFontSize     = parseInt($('config-title-size').value,10)|| configData.titleFontSize;
  configData.position          = parseInt($('config-position').value,10)  || configData.position;
  configData.hidePositionLabel = $('config-hide-position-label').checked;
  configData.fretLabelFontSize = parseInt($('config-fret-label-size').value,10)|| configData.fretLabelFontSize;
  configData.fretLabelColor    = configData.hidePositionLabel ? '#ffffff' : '#000000';
  configData.style             = $('config-style').checked ? 'handdrawn' : 'normal';

  const raw = $('config-string-labels').value
                .split(',').map(s=>s.trim()).filter(s=>s);
  if ($('config-show-string-labels').checked && raw.length === configData.strings) {
    configData.tuning = raw.slice();
  } else if (!$('config-show-string-labels').checked) {
    configData.tuning = [];
  }

  // watermark fields
  configData.watermarkText     = $('config-watermark-text').value;
  configData.watermarkFontSize = parseInt($('config-watermark-size').value,10)||configData.watermarkFontSize;

  // diagram max-width override
  const mw = parseInt($('config-max-width').value, 10);
  if (!isNaN(mw) && mw > 0) {
    configData.maxWidth = mw;
  }
}

// 7) Nut selectors
function buildNutControls() {
  const c = document.getElementById('nut-controls-container');
  c.innerHTML = '';
  for (let s = configData.strings; s >= 1; s--) {
    const lbl = document.createElement('label');
    lbl.style.marginRight = '1rem';
    lbl.textContent = `String ${s}: `;
    const sel = document.createElement('select');
    sel.id = `nut-${s}`;
    [ ['', '—'], ['0','Open ◯'], ['x','Muted ✕'] ].forEach(([v,t])=>{
      const o = document.createElement('option');
      o.value = v; o.textContent = t;
      sel.appendChild(o);
    });
    sel.addEventListener('input', renderChord);
    lbl.appendChild(sel);
    c.appendChild(lbl);
  }
}

/**
 * Map a mouse event to a string and fret index (1-based).
 * If any string is muted, we skip the first two fret‐bands,
 * so a click at the topmost visible fret still maps to fret 1.
 */
function getHit(event) {
  const svgEl = document.querySelector('#chord-container svg');
  if (!svgEl) return null;

  // 1) Gather & sort the string (vert) and fret (horiz) lines
  const lines = Array.from(svgEl.querySelectorAll('line'));
  const vert = [], horiz = [];
  lines.forEach(l => {
    const x1 = +l.getAttribute('x1'), x2 = +l.getAttribute('x2');
    const y1 = +l.getAttribute('y1'), y2 = +l.getAttribute('y2');
    (Math.abs(x1-x2) < 1e-3 ? vert : horiz).push(l);
  });
  const strLines  = configData.orientation==='vertical' ? vert  : horiz;
  const fretLines = configData.orientation==='vertical' ? horiz : vert;
  if (!strLines.length || !fretLines.length) return null;

  // 2) Sort them in drawing order
  if (configData.orientation==='vertical') {
    strLines.sort((a,b)=>+a.getAttribute('x1') - +b.getAttribute('x1'));
    fretLines.sort((a,b)=>+a.getAttribute('y1') - +b.getAttribute('y1'));
  } else {
    strLines.sort((a,b)=>+a.getAttribute('y1') - +b.getAttribute('y1'));
    fretLines.sort((a,b)=>+a.getAttribute('x1') - +b.getAttribute('x1'));
  }

  // 3) Compute pixel positions of each line
  const rect = svgEl.getBoundingClientRect();
  const vb   = svgEl.viewBox.baseVal;
  const sX   = rect.width  / vb.width;
  const sY   = rect.height / vb.height;

  const stringPx = strLines.map(l => {
    const c = configData.orientation==='vertical'
            ? +l.getAttribute('x1')
            : +l.getAttribute('y1');
    return configData.orientation==='vertical'
      ? rect.left + (c - vb.x)*sX
      : rect.top  + (c - vb.y)*sY;
  });
  const allFretPx = fretLines.map(l => {
    const c = configData.orientation==='vertical'
            ? +l.getAttribute('y1')
            : +l.getAttribute('x1');
    return configData.orientation==='vertical'
      ? rect.top  + (c - vb.y)*sY
      : rect.left + (c - vb.x)*sX;
  });

  // 4) Determine how many bands to skip
  const anyMuted = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('[id^="nut-"]'))
                         .some(sel => sel.value === 'x');
  const skip = anyMuted ? 2 : 0;

  // 5) Build the active fret‐band array
  const fretPx = allFretPx.slice(skip);

  // 6) Map the click into string/fret‐band coordinates
  const px = configData.orientation==='vertical' ? event.clientX : event.clientY;
  const py = configData.orientation==='vertical' ? event.clientY : event.clientX;

  // horizontal bounds
  const half = Math.abs(stringPx[1]-stringPx[0]) / 2;
  if (px < stringPx[0]-half || px > stringPx[stringPx.length-1]+half) return null;
  // vertical bounds (on active bands)
  if (py < fretPx[0] || py > fretPx[fretPx.length-1]) return null;

  // 7) Nearest string
  let best = { idx: 0, dist: Infinity };
  stringPx.forEach((v,i) => {
    const d = Math.abs(px - v);
    if (d < best.dist) best = { idx: i, dist: d };
  });
  let stringIdx = configData.orientation==='vertical'
                ? configData.strings - best.idx
                : best.idx + 1;
  stringIdx = Math.max(1, Math.min(configData.strings, stringIdx));

  // 8) Which fret‐band?
  let fretIdx = 1;
  for (let i = 1; i < fretPx.length; i++) {
    if (py >= fretPx[i-1] && py < fretPx[i]) {
      fretIdx = i;
      break;
    }
  }
  // clamp to total frets
  fretIdx = Math.max(1, Math.min(configData.frets, fretIdx));

  return { stringIdx, fretIdx };
}
// 9) Preview on hover/drag
function onOverlayMove(e) {
  const hit = getHit(e);
  if (!hit) {
    preview = { finger: null, barre: null };
  } else if (dragStart && hit.stringIdx !== dragStart.stringIdx) {
    preview = {
      finger: null,
      barre: {
        fromString: Math.max(dragStart.stringIdx, hit.stringIdx),
        toString:   Math.min(dragStart.stringIdx, hit.stringIdx),
        fret:       dragStart.fretIdx
      }
    };
  } else if (!dragStart && hit.fretIdx > 0) {
    preview = { finger: hit, barre: null };
  } else {
    preview = { finger: null, barre: null };
  }
  renderChord();
}

// 10) Overlay click/drag handlers
function onOverlayDown(e) {
  dragStart = getHit(e);
}
function onOverlayUp(e) {
  const hit = getHit(e);
  if (!hit) { dragStart = null; return; }
  if (dragStart && hit.stringIdx !== dragStart.stringIdx) {
    toggleBarre(dragStart.stringIdx, hit.stringIdx, dragStart.fretIdx);
  } else {
    toggleDot(hit.stringIdx, hit.fretIdx);
  }
  dragStart = null;
  preview = { finger: null, barre: null };
  renderChord();
}

// 11) toggleDot
function toggleDot(s,f){
  const idx=chordData.fingers.findIndex(x=>x[0]===s&&x[1]===f);
  if(idx>=0) chordData.fingers.splice(idx,1);
  else chordData.fingers.push([
    s,f,{
      shape:'circle',
      color:dotOptions.fillColor,
      strokeColor:dotOptions.strokeColor,
      strokeWidth:dotOptions.strokeWidth,
      text:dotOptions.labelText,
      textColor:dotOptions.labelColor,
      textSize:dotOptions.labelFontSize
    }
  ]);
}

// 12) toggleBarre
function toggleBarre(a,b,f){
  const from=Math.max(a,b), to=Math.min(a,b);
  const idx=chordData.barres.findIndex(bar=>bar.fromString===from&&bar.toString===to&&bar.fret===f);
  if(idx>=0) chordData.barres.splice(idx,1);
  else chordData.barres.push({
    shape:'barre',
    fromString:from,
    toString:to,
    fret:f,
    color:dotOptions.fillColor,
    strokeColor:dotOptions.strokeColor,
    strokeWidth:dotOptions.strokeWidth,
    text:dotOptions.labelText||undefined,
    textColor:dotOptions.labelColor,
    textSize:dotOptions.labelFontSize
  });
}

// 13) clearAll
function clearAll(){
  chordData.fingers=[];
  chordData.barres=[];
  for(let s=1;s<=configData.strings;s++){
    const sel=document.getElementById(`nut-${s}`);
    if(sel) sel.value='';
  }
  renderChord();
}

// 14) renderChord (with ghost + horizontal fix)
function renderChord() {
  const wrapper = document.getElementById('diagram-wrapper');
  const overlay = document.getElementById('click-overlay');

  // (1) Build up the arrays of “fingers” and “barres” including preview shapes
  const fingers = chordData.fingers.slice();
  const barres  = chordData.barres.slice();

  // (2) Add nut‐markers (open/muted) from your selects
  for (let s = configData.strings; s >= 1; s--) {
    const sel = document.getElementById(`nut-${s}`);
    if (!sel) continue;
    if (sel.value === '0') {
      fingers.push([s, 0, {
        shape: 'circle',
        color: 'none',
        strokeColor: dotOptions.fillColor,
        strokeWidth: dotOptions.strokeWidth
      }]);
    } else if (sel.value === 'x') {
      fingers.push([s, 'x']);
    }
  }

  // (3) Build ghost‐preview shapes (on hover/drag)
  const pF = [], pB = [];
  const toRGBA = (hex, a) => {
    const [r, g, b] = hex.match(/\w\w/g).map(x => parseInt(x, 16));
    return `rgba(${r},${g},${b},${a})`;
  };
  if (preview.finger) {
    const { stringIdx, fretIdx } = preview.finger;
    pF.push([stringIdx, fretIdx, {
      shape:       'circle',
      color:       toRGBA(dotOptions.fillColor, 0.5),
      strokeColor: toRGBA(dotOptions.strokeColor, 0.5),
      strokeWidth: dotOptions.strokeWidth,
      text:        dotOptions.labelText,
      textColor:   toRGBA(dotOptions.labelColor, 0.5),
      textSize:    dotOptions.labelFontSize
    }]);
  }
  if (preview.barre) {
    const { fromString, toString, fret } = preview.barre;
    pB.push({
      shape:       'barre',
      fromString,
      toString,
      fret,
      color:       toRGBA(dotOptions.fillColor, 0.5),
      strokeColor: toRGBA(dotOptions.strokeColor, 0.5),
      strokeWidth: dotOptions.strokeWidth,
      text:        dotOptions.labelText || undefined,
      textColor:   toRGBA(dotOptions.labelColor, 0.5),
      textSize:    dotOptions.labelFontSize
    });
  }

  // (4) Now draw with SVGuitar, injecting watermark props here:
  chordChart
    .configure({
      ...configData,
      watermark:         configData.watermarkText || undefined,
      watermarkFontSize: configData.watermarkFontSize
    })
    .chord({
      fingers: [...fingers, ...pF],
      barres:  [...barres,  ...pB]
    })
    .draw();
	if (configData.orientation === 'horizontal') {
    const svgEl   = document.querySelector('#chord-container svg');
    const texts   = Array.from(svgEl.querySelectorAll('text'));
    const labelEl = texts.find(t => /fr$/.test(t.textContent));
    if (labelEl) {
      const bb     = labelEl.getBBox();
      const gutter = bb.width + 5;
      const vbArr  = svgEl.getAttribute('viewBox')
                         .split(/[\s,]+/)
                         .map(Number); // [minX, minY, w, h]
      vbArr[0]    -= gutter;       // shift left
      vbArr[2]    += gutter * 2;   // widen both sides
      svgEl.setAttribute('viewBox', vbArr.join(' '));
      svgEl.setAttribute('preserveAspectRatio','xMinYMid meet');
    }
  }

  // now re-attach overlay as before
  if (overlay.parentNode !== wrapper) {
    wrapper.appendChild(overlay);
  }

  // (5) Re‐attach the overlay if needed
  if (overlay.parentNode !== wrapper) {
    wrapper.appendChild(overlay);
  }
}

// 15) Download helpers
function downloadSVG(){
  const svgEl=document.querySelector('#chord-container svg');
  if(!svgEl) return alert('No diagram to download');
  const data=new XMLSerializer().serializeToString(svgEl),
        blob=new Blob([data],{type:'image/svg+xml'}),
        url=URL.createObjectURL(blob),
        a=document.createElement('a');
  a.href=url; a.download='fretboard.svg';
  document.body.appendChild(a); a.click(); document.body.removeChild(a);
  URL.revokeObjectURL(url);
}
function downloadPNG() {
  const svgEl = document.querySelector('#chord-container svg');
  if (!svgEl) return alert('No diagram to export');

  // 1) Decide your target pixel size (e.g. 3× on-screen)
  const onScreenRect = svgEl.getBoundingClientRect();
  const targetW      = Math.round(onScreenRect.width  * 3);
  const targetH      = Math.round(onScreenRect.height * 3);

  // 2) Clone & upscale
  const clone = svgEl.cloneNode(true);
  clone.setAttribute('width',  targetW);
  clone.setAttribute('height', targetH);
  // keep the same viewBox so contents scale to fill
  clone.setAttribute('viewBox', svgEl.getAttribute('viewBox'));

  // 3) Serialize the clone
  const data = new XMLSerializer().serializeToString(clone);
  const base = 'data:image/svg+xml;base64,' + btoa(data);

  // 4) Draw & download
  const img = new Image();
  img.onload = () => {
    const canvas = document.createElement('canvas');
    canvas.width  = targetW;
    canvas.height = targetH;
    const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
    ctx.drawImage(img, 0, 0, targetW, targetH);

    canvas.toBlob(blob => {
      const url = URL.createObjectURL(blob);
      const a   = document.createElement('a');
      a.href    = url;
      a.download= 'fretboard.png';
      document.body.appendChild(a);
      a.click();
      document.body.removeChild(a);
      URL.revokeObjectURL(url);
    }, 'image/png');
  };
  img.src = base;
}
  </script>
</div>
```
